SAMPLE INSTRUMENT
▶ Select SAMP in the instrument row (PIANO / CLEAN / ELEC / STRAT / SAMP) to activate, then play the fretboard normally.
Root Note = the pitch Jimi is playing at that moment (e.g. E4, B3, G3). Guitar range: E2–E6. The app finds the nearest sample and transposes it.
A=440 | — · 0 notes ⚡ Pick attack ms

SAMPLE PACKS
Tip: find a single clear note in recording, note the timestamp, set root to its pitch (e.g. E4=64). Nearest sample auto-selected ± transpose.
🎼 COLOUR NOTATION
⬢ SCALE HIVE · COLOUR MAP
Each hexagon = a known scale, placed by its signature colour. Drag to rotate · tap to load · zoom folds cells into larger hexagons.
🎙 IMPROVS LIBRARY
Your saved takes — recording + backing mix, tagged with score. Use LIB+ in the REC bar to add the current recording.
🎧 BACKING TRACKS ▾
⚠ Some backing tracks may contain explicit lyrics.
Each track carries a chord progression that drives the scale as it plays. Improvise along, earn a grade, fill your aura to unlock more.

UNLOCK
One-time. Permanent. No subscription.
  • NAM AMP + IR CAB LOADER — real neural amp models & cabinet impulses, live through your rig
  • ALTERATION SYSTEM — octatonics, blues, harmonic/melodic colour on any mode
  • HEXATONIC INCLUDE / EXCLUDE — sculpt any six-note scale, named as you build it
  • AUTHENTIC GUITAR FEEL — bends, hammer-ons, pull-offs, slides, tapping, PIMA
  • FRET SEGMENTS + KEYSIG + PENTA — the whole neck, one segment at a time
  • CUSTOM + CHORD + BKTRK autoplay · WAV + CAP + LIB export
  • No ads while active
[AD · 320×50]
IMPROVS2 ✕
Version
Through colour association, unlock a deeper understanding of music. The palette doesn't matter — but mine, I promise, makes sense. I need your trust.
Less an app than a musical encyclopedia. Get lost in the colour theory — or play the way the greats did, from Mozart to Hendrix, flipping pages in their mind.
It was cold in the void, maddening — the silence. Then the chicken was an astronaut. He crossed over, and laid some eggs… the land unclaimed, waiting to be explored.
Developed by TRiCkiSh x ShAM
CREDITS
Thanks to tone3000.com for its awesome third party api!
Ring ID used to identify named scales/families, thanks to ianring.com!
thanks to all who have ever loved me
Peace and Love,
Matt (TRiCkiSh x ShAM)
NOTE · COLOUR KEY
EVERY COLOUR IS A SCALE
TRiCkiSh × ShAM · IMPROVS2
Music isn't black & white — feel the temperature. The 1 is home; every step away cools toward the void.
♭5 · VOID◄ WARM  1 HOME  COOL ►VOID · ♭5
1 is home — white, the root, the hot centre. Warm colours run left, cool colours run right, and both cool to black at the edges: the ♭5, the void.
1Pick a KEY + MODE. The colour you see is that scale's signature.
2Tap the coloured degree buttons or the fretboard to hear it.
3Open ✿ LOTUS to wander scale-space — neighbours are one note apart.
TIP
